creator: svysh@pn.sinp.msu.ru
text:
Please find attached a new pkg-plist.gz file. Thank you.

On 08.12.2012 18:29, Frederic Culot wrote:
> Hi Sergei,
>
> thanks for submitting this update, however there seems to be an
> inconsistency between the plist and the use of PORT{EXAMPLES,DATA,DOCS}
> in Makefile. This leads to warnings during the deinstall phase as shown
> in the following log:
>
> http://people.freebsd.org/~culot/files/p5-Workflow-1.35.log
>
> Would you mind having a look at it Sergei?
>
> Thanks,
> Frederic
>
